context: Tests whether the agent produces structured acceptance criteria for adding a video variant to an existing Hero block without writing code. Covers variant behavior, video attributes, mobile fallback, impact assessment, edge cases, and accessibility.

checklist.name: Variant behavior clearly defined
checklist.description: Describes what the video variant does differently from the existing image variant; clearly distinguishes the two variants' behavior

checklist.name: Video attributes specified
checklist.description: Mentions autoplay, muted, and loop requirements for the background video

checklist.name: Mobile fallback addressed
checklist.description: Poster image fallback on mobile is explicitly covered with criteria for when and how it triggers (e.g., viewport breakpoint, device detection, or connection speed)

checklist.name: Impact on existing variant assessed
checklist.description: Confirms that the existing image variant must remain unchanged and functional; assesses risk of regression

checklist.name: Edge cases identified
checklist.description: Addresses edge cases such as: video fails to load, no poster image provided, unsupported video format, very short or very long videos

checklist.name: Responsive behavior specified
checklist.description: Mobile poster vs desktop video behavior is explicitly defined; tablet behavior is mentioned or addressed

checklist.name: Author experience documented
checklist.description: Describes how the author enables the video variant and provides video/poster content (NOT implementation details like CSS classes or HTML attributes)

checklist.name: Accessibility considered
checklist.description: Mentions reduced motion preference (prefers-reduced-motion), video without audio implications, or screen reader considerations

checklist.name: Definition of done is testable
checklist.description: Specific, verifiable completion conditions that can be checked without ambiguity
